quotes.quote: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: Your most unhappy customers are your greatest source of learning.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.quote: The people who are crazy enough to think they can change the world are the ones who do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: If something is important enough, even if the odds are against you, you should still do it.
quotes.author: Elon Musk

quotes.quote: Move fast and break things. Unless you are breaking stuff, you are not moving fast enough.
quotes.author: Mark Zuckerberg

quotes.quote: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.quote: If you double the number of experiments you do per year, you’re going to double your inventiveness.
quotes.author: Jeff Bezos

quotes.quote: Don’t be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
quotes.author: John D. Rockefeller

quotes.quote: Great things in business are never done by one person; they’re done by a team of people.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: Failure is an option here. If things are not failing, you are not innovating enough.
quotes.author: Elon Musk

quotes.quote: It’s fine to celebrate success, but it is more important to heed the lessons of failure.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.quote: Work hard on something uncomfortably exciting.
quotes.author: Larry Page

quotes.quote: The biggest risk is not taking any risk.
quotes.author: Mark Zuckerberg

quotes.quote: It’s not about ideas. It’s about making ideas happen.
quotes.author: Scott Belsky

quotes.quote: If you are offered a seat on a rocket ship, don’t ask what seat! Just get on.
quotes.author: Sheryl Sandberg

quotes.quote: The question I ask myself almost every day is, ‘Am I doing the most important thing I could be doing?’
quotes.author: Mark Zuckerberg

quotes.quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: Don’t compare yourself with anyone in this world. If you do so, you are insulting yourself.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.quote: If you live each day as if it was your last, someday you’ll most certainly be right.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: Persistence is very important. You should not give up unless you are forced to give up.
quotes.author: Elon Musk

quotes.quote: I knew that if I failed, I wouldn’t regret that. But I knew the one thing I might regret is not trying.
quotes.author: Jeff Bezos

quotes.quote: The true sign of intelligence is not knowledge but imagination.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: Technology is nothing. What’s important is that you have faith in people.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: If you can’t make it good, at least make it look good.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.quote: Be stubborn on vision but flexible on details.
quotes.author: Jeff Bezos

quotes.quote: When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favor.
quotes.author: Elon Musk

quotes.quote: Don’t worry about failure; you only have to be right once.
quotes.author: Drew Houston

quotes.quote: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.quote: In the world of Internet Customer Service, it’s important to remember your competitor is only one mouse click away.
quotes.author: Doug Warner

quotes.quote: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
quotes.author: Arthur C. Clarke

quotes.quote: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
quotes.author: Jesus Christ

quotes.quote: With man this is impossible, but with God all things are possible.
quotes.author: Jesus Christ

quotes.quote: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: If you can’t fly then run, if you can’t run then walk, if you can’t walk then crawl, but whatever you do you have to keep moving forward.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.
